prerequisites.value: Dex 15, Exotic Weapon Proficiency ( spiked chain ).

description.value: **Benefit:** You treat a spiked chain as a one-handed martial weapon for all purposes. You can still choose to wield a spiked chain as a two-handed weapon, and if you do so, you gain a +2 bonus on combat maneuver checks to disarm or trip foes with your spiked chain.
